stats.emptyState: Starting to track this product. Check back in 24h for history.

reasons.priceHigherThanMax: The 'original' price is {percentage}% above the real historical maximum — the discount is inflated.
reasons.priceHigherThanAverage: The 'original' price is {percentage}% above the average price for the period.
reasons.priceHigherThan30DayLow: Current price is {percentage}% higher than the 30-day minimum — it was cheaper recently.
reasons.priceRecentlyIncreased: The price was raised shortly before the announced discount.
reasons.legitimateDiscount: The discount matches historical price patterns.
reasons.belowAverage: Current price is {percentage}% below average — a good opportunity.
reasons.atAllTimeLow: Price is at (or near) the all-time low — a rare deal.
reasons.stablePrice: Price has barely moved over the last 30 days.
reasons.insufficientData: Need at least {needed} days of history for a final verdict ({current}/{needed} so far).

settings.title: Settings
settings.enableEmagDesc: Records price history every time you open a product on Emag.bg.
settings.enableOzoneDesc: Records price history every time you open a product on Ozone.bg.
settings.showWidgetDesc: Displays the chart directly on the product page. When off, prices are still tracked silently in the background — the chart just won't appear.
settings.clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history?
